entries.feature: Default application shell, module navigation, CLI modes, and lifecycle
entries.notes: The default app is zero-CGO gogpu/ui and no longer routes through the legacy Fyne tab lifecycle.

entries.feature: Documentation screenshots and demo frame capture
entries.notes: The gogpu screenshotter captures real app frames without Xvfb, OpenGL Fyne capture, or window-manager dependencies.

entries.feature: Legacy visual crawler and recording helpers
entries.notes: Static screenshot capture is covered by gogpu. Runtime recording and crawler-style interactive assertions still need an explicit gogpu replacement or a decision to retire them.

entries.feature: P-E loop workspace, material controls, calibration, PUND/FORC, literature overlays, export dialogs, and custom hysteresis widgets
entries.notes: Core material selection and P-E loop state exist in gogpu. PUND, FORC, calibration dialogs, literature overlays, export workflows, and several educational widgets need explicit gogpu parity or a better replacement.

entries.feature: Crossbar array controls, MVM heatmaps, IR drop, sneak paths, drift, FeCap/3D stack tabs, live slides, and comparison widgets
entries.notes: Core array size, MVM, IR toggle, and heatmap rendering exist in gogpu. Dedicated non-ideality tabs, live-slide flow, comparison widgets, and export validation need parity decisions.

entries.feature: MNIST inference dashboard, dual-mode demo, accuracy sweep, energy and quantization widgets, activation/weight views, dialogs, and export
entries.notes: Core inference summary exists in gogpu. Dual-mode interactions, training/weight visualizations, detailed preprocessing, accuracy sweep controls, and export workflows need parity decisions.

entries.feature: Peripheral circuits workspace, unified array canvas, read/write/compute paths, ISPP, half-select stress, PVT, reference specs, comparison metrics, and overlays
entries.notes: Gogpu exposes circuit metrics, sections, unified controls, a state-responsive unified canvas overlay, half-select/stress budget state, PVT investigation summaries, reference-spec/compliance summaries, reference-spec JSON export, reference timing summaries, reference timing JSON export, operation-log summaries, summary-level operation-log export, and detailed deterministic compute-run logs. Logger verbosity controls, animated timing diagrams, waveform/SVG export workflows, deep investigation panels, and detailed visual interactions need parity decisions.

entries.feature: Unified controls action contract for array size, operation mode, architecture, selected cell, write target, DAC/ADC/TIA, coupling tier, and ISPP engine
entries.notes: This ports the shared gogpu/viewmodel control vocabulary and state transitions. It does not claim parity for the animated circuit canvas, overlays, operation-log surfaces, or deep investigation panels tracked by the broader circuits gap entry.

entries.feature: Unified canvas overlay for selected array/cell, read/write/compute path state, and last-operation feedback
entries.notes: This ports a gogpu-rendered operational canvas fed by snapshot metrics. It does not claim parity for all legacy overlay submodes, logger verbosity controls, deep investigation panels, or reference animation/export panels.

entries.feature: Half-select / column-write stress state and educational stress budget
entries.notes: This ports deterministic half-select/column-write stress summary state into gogpu. It does not claim full legacy residue evolution, retention drift fitting, or deep investigation-panel parity.

entries.feature: PVT investigation summaries for temperature sweep, process-yield proxy, corner ENOB, and thermal-noise ENOB ceiling
entries.notes: This ports summary-level PVT investigation state into the gogpu snapshot and overlay. It does not claim full legacy sweep plots, interactive PVT controls, retained result logs, or calibrated silicon-corner guarantees.

entries.feature: Reference spec and compliance summaries for storage, component counts, power, latency, throughput, and DAC/ADC level coverage
entries.notes: This ports summary-level reference specs into the gogpu snapshot and overlay. JSON export is tracked separately. It does not claim full legacy reference tab parity, editable spec-only controls, or calibrated hardware compliance.

entries.feature: Reference spec JSON export as buffered artifact or validated-path JSON file
entries.notes: This ports reference-spec export for current viewmodel rows, columns, converter counts/codes, power, latency, throughput, efficiency, compliance, and educational boundary notice. The gogpu action buffers JSON by default and writes the same JSON to a validated path when supplied. It does not claim CSV export, dialog parity, waveform/SVG export, or full legacy reference-tab export UX.

entries.feature: Reference timing summaries for write/read/compute totals and active phase durations
entries.notes: This ports summary-level timing totals and active operation phase durations into the gogpu snapshot and overlay. JSON export is tracked separately. It does not claim waveform drawing parity, animation controls, SVG/PNG waveform export, or a dedicated reference timing panel.

entries.feature: Reference timing JSON export as buffered artifact or validated-path JSON file
entries.notes: This ports reference timing export for write, read, and compute totals plus structured phase durations and active-operation context. The gogpu action buffers JSON by default and writes the same JSON to a validated path when supplied. It does not claim animated timing diagrams, raster waveform snapshots, SVG/PNG waveform export, or dialog parity.

entries.feature: Operation log summaries for successful read/write/compute runs and control changes
entries.notes: This ports deterministic UI-neutral operation-log summaries with retained recent entries and a compact gogpu overlay surface. It does not claim compute-run detail payloads, logger verbosity toggles, or export parity.

entries.feature: Operation log summary export as buffered JSON artifact or validated-path JSON file
entries.notes: This ports export for retained operation-log entries. The gogpu action buffers JSON by default and writes the same JSON to a validated path when supplied. Detailed compute-run payloads are tracked separately; logger verbosity controls remain out of scope.

entries.feature: Detailed compute-run MVM log payload with input vector, weights, conductances, row ADC/TIA results, saturation flags, and per-cell current terms
entries.notes: This ports deterministic UI-neutral compute-run detail into gogpu snapshots and operation-log export when the latest operation is compute. It uses current viewmodel state and deterministic educational MVM terms; it does not claim legacy logger toggles, timestamps, or hardware-calibrated trace parity.

entries.feature: Technology comparison, evidence model, scenario profiles, sensitivity analysis, market/fabrication reality panels, hero cards, and export
entries.notes: Canonical architecture comparison is ported. Scenario editing, sensitivity and market panels, fabrication reality messaging, and export need parity decisions.

entries.feature: EDA design suite, builder validation, export viewer, layout visualization, learning center, visual explainers, and layout canvas
entries.notes: Gogpu shows EDA summary, export formats, and representative generated text. The builder wizard, validation tab, layout viewer, learning center, and custom layout visuals need parity decisions.

entries.feature: Documentation viewer, navigation, search, glossary integration, layout, and persistence
entries.notes: Gogpu exposes documentation sections and trust-boundary content. Search, glossary integration, navigation state, and persistence need parity decisions.

entries.feature: Reusable legacy widgets, theme systems, keyboard help, and Fyne export helpers
entries.notes: Gogpu has design tokens plus plot and heatmap renderers. Shared Fyne widgets and theme affordances need a mapped gogpu design-system replacement, retirement decision, or module-specific reimplementation.
